description: Investment partnership agreement (עסקא) for one month dated 1 Av 5575 AM (1815 CE), in Cairo (מצרים). Between Khalīfah b. Ḥayyīm Najjār and Ḥabibah bt. Ḥayyīm Yosef. The invested sum is 27,000 m[edin] k[esif]. Khalīfah leaves a few valuable gold items with Ḥabibah as collateral for the investment. The scribe Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen signed (perhaps too hastily) with a poorly rendered calligraphic signature. Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen also notes that Khalīfah Najjār has designated him sign as his proxy (לי צוה המתעסק הנ׳׳ז הר׳ כליפה נגאר לחתום כעדו), therefore he also signs in the middle of the document where legal parties normally would. The other witness signature is from Eliyahu Shalom. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
